buildSummary: Core Anima sustain/support. Prioritize support uptime and survivability over personal damage.

diskSets.name: Eternal Waltz (S)
diskSets.note: Great sustain-oriented Arc for supports that cast Ultimate frequently.

diskSets.name: Call of the Twisted City (A)
diskSets.note: Stable A-rank fallback for heal-focused or utility-heavy support setups.

modules.name: S-tier Utility Modules
modules.note: Cycle Rate + HP/DEF for stable support uptime.

modules.name: A-tier Utility Modules
modules.note: Use mixed defensive rolls until better drops.

skillPriority.scales: Healing ticks, sustain uptime, and team safety.
Emergency stabilization and support burst value.

farming.name: Esper EXP materials
farming.tip: Keep supports within 10 levels of your main carry for safer anomaly runs.

farming.name: Support-skill upgrade mats
farming.tip: Prioritize the support skill node before basic attack upgrades.

farming.name: Module enhancement chips
farming.tip: Target Cycle Rate and HP/DEF lines for consistency.
